name: Q34286
abstract: Alexander Graham Bell ( ; born Alexander Bell; March 3, 1847 – August 2, 1922) was a  Scottish-born Canadian-American inventor, scientist, and engineer who is credited with patenting the first practical telephone. He also co-founded the American Telephone and Telegraph Company (AT&T) in 1885.

concerts.label: The Civic Forum: Presentation of Civic Forum Medal of Honor to Alexander Graham Bell
